config.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Application Configuration
Uses Pydantic Settings for type-safe env var management.

classes.name: Settings
classes.docstring: Central configuration. All values loaded from environment variables.

functions.name: get_plan_config
functions.docstring: Return a safe plan config copy with fallback to free.

functions.name: is_valid_plan
functions.docstring: Check whether the supplied plan name is valid.

functions.name: is_valid_difficulty_mode
functions.docstring: Check whether the supplied difficulty mode is one of the supported public values.

functions.name: normalize_difficulty_mode
functions.docstring: Return a safe difficulty-mode value with fallback to auto.

functions.name: get_difficulty_mode_config
functions.docstring: Return a safe difficulty-mode config copy.

functions.name: can_access_plan
functions.docstring: Check whether a user's current plan can access a requested plan.

functions.name: get_env
functions.docstring: Small helper for non-pydantic one-off environment access.

functions.name: get_settings
functions.docstring: Cached settings singleton.

dependencies.py.docstring:
PrepVista - FastAPI dependencies
Common dependencies injected into route handlers.

classes.name: UserProfile
classes.docstring: User context object attached to authenticated requests.

methods.name: effective_plan
methods.docstring: Highest owned plan is used for gating unless admin override is active.

methods.name: effective_config
methods.docstring: Plan config based on effective plan.

methods.name: has_feature
methods.docstring: Check if user has access to a feature.

methods.name: has_expired_paid_plan
methods.docstring: Return True when a paid plan existed before but is no longer active.

methods.name: premium_lock_message
methods.docstring: Build a user-facing lock message for expired or missing premium access.

functions.name: _decode_token_identity
functions.docstring: Decode Supabase JWT locally to avoid network round-trips on every request.

functions.name: get_current_user
functions.docstring: Extract and verify JWT from Authorization header or cookie.

functions.name: require_plan
functions.docstring: Dependency that gates access based on plan tier.

main.py.docstring:
PrepVista — FastAPI Application Factory
Production entry point. Registers all routers, middleware, and lifecycle events.

functions.name: _validate_runtime_environment
functions.docstring: Log a clear startup contract for Render and fail early on missing essentials.

functions.name: _run_user_activity_refresh_loop
functions.docstring: Keep live-user counts fresh as users become active or inactive.

functions.name: _describe_startup_error
functions.docstring: Return a useful startup error string even when str(exc) is empty.

functions.name: _health_payload
functions.docstring: Build a consistent lightweight health payload.

functions.name: _bootstrap_runtime_services
functions.docstring: Bring up DB-backed services in the background so the port binds quickly.

functions.name: lifespan
functions.docstring: Startup and shutdown events.

database\\connection.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Database Connection Pool
Uses asyncpg for high-performance async PostgreSQL access.

classes.name: DatabaseNotReadyError
classes.docstring: Raised when the database pool is not ready for application traffic.

classes.name: DatabaseConnection
classes.docstring: Async context manager for database connections.

functions.name: _describe_db_error
functions.docstring: Return a useful error string even for empty exception messages.

functions.name: _require_db_pool
functions.docstring: Return the active pool or raise a clean not-ready error.

functions.name: init_db_pool
functions.docstring: Initialize the connection pool on app startup.

functions.name: close_db_pool
functions.docstring: Close pool on app shutdown.

functions.name: get_db
functions.docstring: Get a connection from the pool.

functions.name: _run_migrations
functions.docstring: Run schema creation. Idempotent - safe to run on every startup.

middleware\\error_handler.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Global Error Handler
Structured error responses for all exception types.

functions.name: register_error_handlers
functions.docstring: Register global exception handlers on the FastAPI app.

middleware\\rate_limiter.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Redis-Based Rate Limiter
Sliding window rate limiting using Upstash Redis REST API.
Falls back to in-memory if Redis is unavailable.

functions.name: _redis_rate_check
functions.docstring: Check rate limit via Upstash Redis REST API. Returns True if allowed.

functions.name: _memory_rate_check
functions.docstring: In-memory sliding window fallback.

functions.name: rate_limit_ip
functions.docstring: Rate limit by client IP for anonymous endpoints.

functions.name: rate_limit_user
functions.docstring: Rate limit by authenticated user ID.

functions.name: rate_limit_session
functions.docstring: Rate limit per interview session (prevents automation).

middleware\\security_headers.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Security Headers Middleware
Adds production security headers to every response.

routers\\account.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Account Router
Own-account management that does not change the auth flow structure.

functions.name: _delete_supabase_auth_user
functions.docstring: Delete the matching Supabase auth user with the service role key.

functions.name: delete_account
functions.docstring: Delete the current user's live account data and archive minimal identity.

routers\\admin.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Admin Router
Admin-only oversight for users, launch-offer metrics, referrals, and feedback.

functions.name: require_admin
functions.docstring: Allow admin-only endpoints for the configured admin account.

functions.name: get_admin_overview
functions.docstring: Return one admin snapshot for users, launch-offer metrics, referrals, and feedback.

functions.name: reset_launch_offers
functions.docstring: Delete all launch-offer grants and optionally reset settings.

routers\\admin_grants.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Admin Grants
Endpoints for manipulating fine-grained user subscription limits and tiers manually.

functions.name: _clear_model_bonus_override
functions.docstring: Remove the stored bonus marker that belongs to the selected model.

functions.name: grant_admin_access
functions.docstring: Apply targeted overrides or unlocks to a user's subscription natively.

routers\\admin_support.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Global Support Chat Plugin (Admin Facing)
Endpoints allowing administrators to query all platform messages and manually send responses.

functions.name: get_support_users
functions.docstring: Fetch all users who have initiated support threads, ordered by the most recent message so admins know who is active.

functions.name: get_user_thread
functions.docstring: Retrieve the full context thread for a specific targeted user.

functions.name: send_admin_reply
functions.docstring: Send an official reply directly to the end-user's chat widget.

routers\\auth.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Auth Router
Handles signup, login, and token refresh via Supabase Auth.

functions.name: _is_admin_email
functions.docstring: Return True when the given email matches the configured admin email.

functions.name: _require_deliverable_signup_email
functions.docstring: Reject manual signups that use a syntactically valid but undeliverable email.

functions.name: _delete_supabase_auth_user
functions.docstring: Delete a Supabase auth user with the service role key.

functions.name: _get_supabase_identity
functions.docstring: Resolve the authenticated Supabase user from the bearer token.

functions.name: account_status
functions.docstring: Check whether a PrepVista profile already exists for an email address.

functions.name: request_signup_code
functions.docstring: Send a one-time manual signup verification code to the provided email.

functions.name: signup
functions.docstring: Complete manual signup only after the email verification code is confirmed.

functions.name: login
functions.docstring: Authenticate user via Supabase Auth.

functions.name: complete_oauth_login
functions.docstring: Complete Google OAuth for both new and existing users.

functions.name: refresh_token
functions.docstring: Refresh an expired access token.

functions.name: complete_onboarding
functions.docstring: Complete the onboarding wizard.

functions.name: get_me
functions.docstring: Get current user profile.

routers\\billing.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Billing Router
Razorpay order creation, payment verification, switching active plans, and webhook handling.

functions.name: create_razorpay_order
functions.docstring: Create a Razorpay order for a new plan purchase.

functions.name: verify_razorpay_payment
functions.docstring: Verify a Razorpay payment server-side and activate the purchased plan.

functions.name: switch_active_plan
functions.docstring: Switch the currently selected plan without repurchasing.

functions.name: razorpay_webhook
functions.docstring: Handle incoming Razorpay webhook events.

functions.name: get_billing_status
functions.docstring: Get current billing state, owned plans, and recent payments.

routers\\dashboard.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Dashboard Router
User dashboard: session history, stats, skill tracking.

functions.name: get_dashboard
functions.docstring: Get dashboard data: stats, recent sessions, usage.

functions.name: get_public_growth_banner
functions.docstring: Return public-facing user-count messaging for login and landing UI.

functions.name: get_session_history
functions.docstring: Get paginated session history.

functions.name: bulk_delete_session_history
functions.docstring: Delete multiple user interview sessions in one action.

functions.name: delete_session_history
functions.docstring: Delete a user's interview session and all related records.

functions.name: get_skill_breakdown
functions.docstring: Get detailed skill breakdown across all sessions.

routers\\events.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Product funnel events router
Public tracking endpoint with optional user resolution from bearer token.

routers\\feedback.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Feedback Router
Collect user feedback and expose user/admin views.

functions.name: get_feedback_entries
functions.docstring: Return feedback entries for the current user, or all entries for admin.

functions.name: submit_feedback
functions.docstring: Store a feedback entry for the current user.

routers\\interviews.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Interviews Router
Core interview lifecycle: setup, answer, finish.

functions.name: _safe_json_dumps
functions.docstring: Serialize safely for DB JSON columns.

functions.name: _safe_json_loads
functions.docstring: Parse JSON values safely.

functions.name: _cache_client_response
functions.docstring: Persist the last request/response for idempotent client retries.

functions.name: _get_cached_client_response
functions.docstring: Return cached response for duplicate client submissions.

functions.name: setup_interview
functions.docstring: Set up a new interview session.

functions.name: submit_answer
functions.docstring: Submit a user answer and get the next AI question or finish result.

functions.name: end_interview
functions.docstring: Finish the interview and compute final results.

functions.name: terminate_interview
functions.docstring: Force-end the interview due to a hard client-side violation.

functions.name: report_violation
functions.docstring: Log a proctoring violation from the client.

functions.name: _evaluate_and_store
functions.docstring: Run per-question evaluation and persist it.

routers\\referrals.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Referral Router
Public invite queueing plus authenticated referral workspace data.

functions.name: get_my_referrals
functions.docstring: Return referral slots and queue state for the current user.

functions.name: get_public_referral
functions.docstring: Resolve public referral context for invite landing pages.

functions.name: queue_referral_email
functions.docstring: Queue a referred email if it is not already a user and not already claimed.

routers\\reports.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Reports Router
Retrieve interview reports and download PDFs.

functions.name: get_report
functions.docstring: Get the full interview report for a session.

functions.name: download_pdf
functions.docstring: Download the interview report as a PDF. Pro/Career only.

routers\\support.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Global Support Chat Plugin (User Facing)
Endpoints allowing end-users to persist their conversations and query admin responses directly.

functions.name: get_my_chat_history
functions.docstring: Fetch the thread history for the active user.

functions.name: send_support_message
functions.docstring: Allow a user to send a new message optionally containing Base64 image data to the Admin.

services\\analytics.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Analytics Service
Builds persistent skill snapshots from finished interview evaluations.

functions.name: build_dashboard_feedback
functions.docstring: Create beginner-friendly analytics coaching text, with stronger Free-plan guidance.

functions.name: build_interview_neural_feedback
functions.docstring: Build interview-end neural feedback. Free gets the upgraded beginner-coach version.

functions.name: derive_skill_score_rows
functions.docstring: Aggregate per-question evaluations into category-level skill rows.

functions.name: sync_session_skill_scores
functions.docstring: Replace persisted skill rows for a session with fresh aggregates.

functions.name: backfill_missing_skill_scores
functions.docstring: Fill analytics rows for older finished sessions that predate skill tracking.

services\\auth_identity.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Auth identity helpers
Maps one or more auth provider identities to a single canonical profile.

functions.name: resolve_auth_provider
functions.docstring: Resolve the primary auth provider from a Supabase user payload.

functions.name: extract_auth_identity
functions.docstring: Extract a normalized identity snapshot from a Supabase user payload.

functions.name: ensure_auth_identity_link
functions.docstring: Upsert the mapping from an auth identity to the canonical profile id.

functions.name: get_profile_id_for_auth_user
functions.docstring: Return the canonical profile id for a given auth identity, when linked.

functions.name: list_auth_user_ids_for_profile
functions.docstring: Return every linked auth identity for a profile.

services\\email_service.py.docstring:
PrepVista — Email Notification Service
Sends transactional emails via Resend API.
Primary use: admin payment notifications.

functions.name: send_admin_payment_notification
functions.docstring:
Send a payment notification email to the admin.
Returns True if sent successfully, False otherwise.
Non-blocking — failures are logged but don't affect the payment flow.

services\\email_validation.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Email validation helpers
Adds stricter deliverability checks for manual email flows.

functions.name: validate_deliverable_email_address
functions.docstring: Return the normalized email when the address syntax and domain are deliverable.

services\\evaluator.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Evaluator Service
Per-question rubric evaluation plus deterministic final score aggregation.
Free plan uses a simpler, fairer beginner rubric without changing the higher tiers.

functions.name: normalize_rubric_category
functions.docstring: Tighten category mapping so reports stay credible across all plans.

functions.name: evaluate_single_question
functions.docstring:
Evaluate a single question-answer pair using the rubric system.
Returns structured evaluation data.

functions.name: compute_final_score
functions.docstring:
Deterministic final score aggregation from per-question evaluations.
The LLM does not generate this score. This is computed by the backend.

functions.name: get_score_interpretation
functions.docstring: Human-readable interpretation of the final score.

services\\funnel_tracking.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Product funnel event tracking
Stores sparse, high-signal events used for growth and conversion analysis.

services\\history_retention.py.docstring:
PrepVista - History Retention
Caps retained finished interview history by the highest active premium plan.

functions.name: get_history_limit
functions.docstring: Return the retained history limit for the given premium plan.

functions.name: enforce_history_retention
functions.docstring:
Delete the oldest finished sessions beyond the active plan limit.
Free users are not pruned here because history is already locked for them.

services\\interviewer.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Interviewer Service
Manages interview session lifecycle: setup, greeting, Q&A, finish.

functions.name: _clean_ai_response
functions.docstring: Strip leaked internal classifier labels and keep one clean interviewer message.

functions.name: _coerce_question_plan
functions.docstring: Normalize stored question-plan data into a list of dict items.

functions.name: _resume_highlight
functions.docstring: Build a short highlight for deterministic fallback prompts.

functions.name: _coerce_resume_summary_dict
functions.docstring: Normalize stored resume summary payloads into a dictionary.

functions.name: _resume_field_profile
functions.docstring: Use additive resume field routing without breaking older stored summaries.

functions.name: _resume_target_role
functions.docstring: Infer a simple human-readable target role from resume summary signals.

functions.name: _get_next_plan_item
functions.docstring: Return the next planned question item for a turn, if present.

functions.name: _normalize_topic_label
functions.docstring: Create a compact topic label for skip/follow-up tracking.

functions.name: _extract_family_history
functions.docstring: Safely normalize stored family-history data from runtime state.

functions.name: _trim_family_history
functions.docstring: Keep tracked family history small and deduplicated in order.

functions.name: _normalize_candidate_name
functions.docstring: Normalize noisy extracted names so greetings sound natural instead of letter-by-letter.

functions.name: _resume_answer_terms
functions.docstring: Collect a small set of resume-grounded terms that help detect covered angles.

functions.name: _short_target_role_label
functions.docstring: Return a cleaner human role label for anchored live questions.

functions.name: _extract_answer_anchor_facts
functions.docstring: Pull a few concrete facts from the last answer so follow-ups can sound interviewer-led.

functions.name: _build_answer_anchor_summary
functions.docstring: Compress the last answer into a short fact list for the live follow-up prompt.

functions.name: _extract_answer_coverage
functions.docstring: Infer which interview families the latest answer already covered well enough to avoid immediate repeats.

functions.name: _derive_redundant_followup_families
functions.docstring: Turn answer coverage into a small next-turn family blocklist to avoid awkward repeated prompts.

functions.name: _build_answer_led_followup
functions.docstring: Return a deterministic next question when the last answer already implies the right next step.

functions.name: _should_force_answer_led_followup
functions.docstring: Detect when the generated next question ignores what the candidate just answered.

functions.name: _answer_signal_profile
functions.docstring: Extract a few concrete answer signals to make live follow-ups more human and answer-led.

functions.name: _is_ambiguous_followup_question
functions.docstring: Detect vague follow-ups that can confuse a beginner after a good answer.

functions.name: _is_easy_to_understand_question
functions.docstring: Keep the next question short, concrete, and easy to follow.

functions.name: _select_next_plan_item
functions.docstring: Pick the next planned item while softly skipping angles the candidate already covered.

functions.name: _extract_skip_topics
functions.docstring: Safely normalize stored skip-topics data.

functions.name: _trim_skip_topics
functions.docstring: Keep skip-topics bounded so prompt/context stays small.

functions.name: _safe_json_dumps
functions.docstring: Serialize safely for DB JSON columns.

functions.name: _question_retry_limit
functions.docstring: Return a stable per-question retry limit without changing the public plan shape.

functions.name: _record_turn_outcome
functions.docstring: Keep bounded runtime counters so reports and finish scoring share the same truth.

functions.name: _dedupe_preserve_order
functions.docstring: Keep recent ordered strings without duplicates.

functions.name: _plan_target_signature
functions.docstring: Normalize a question-plan target for cross-session cooldown checks.

functions.name: _question_angle_from_text
functions.docstring: Capture the finer interview angle so semantic repeats are easier to block.

functions.name: _resolve_item_difficulty
functions.docstring: Blend plan difficulty with the selected difficulty mode.

functions.name: _sanitize_plan_target
functions.docstring: Keep plan targets short and subject-like so generated questions stay natural.

functions.name: _normalize_generated_question_plan
functions.docstring: Validate and normalize a generated question plan, then backfill gaps safely.

functions.name: _humanize_question_target
functions.docstring: Convert planner-style target text into a natural subject for spoken questions.

functions.name: _humanize_live_question_text
functions.docstring: Remove planner-like phrasing so spoken questions sound more human.

functions.name: _apply_question_style_hints
functions.docstring: Attach a deterministic wording hint so repeated interviews feel less identical.

functions.name: _extract_question_portion
functions.docstring: Extract the actual question portion from an interviewer response.

functions.name: _looks_like_interviewer_question
functions.docstring: Check whether a text turn looks like a single interviewer question.

functions.name: _finalize_interviewer_turn
functions.docstring: Normalize a model turn into one clean interviewer message.

functions.name: _strip_question_intro
functions.docstring: Remove encouragement and wrapper phrases before duplicate comparison.

functions.name: _question_signature
functions.docstring: Build a normalized signature for duplicate-question detection.

functions.name: _question_core_tokens
functions.docstring: Extract content-heavy question tokens for fuzzy duplicate detection.

functions.name: _extract_asked_question_signatures
functions.docstring: Collect normalized signatures for already-asked interviewer questions.

functions.name: _collect_asked_questions
functions.docstring: Return all unique interviewer questions in session order.

functions.name: _collect_recent_asked_questions
functions.docstring: Return recent interviewer questions for prompt-level repeat avoidance.

functions.name: _load_recent_session_question_memory
functions.docstring: Collect recent cross-session interview memory so new sessions feel fresher.

functions.name: _is_duplicate_question
functions.docstring: Detect exact or near-duplicate question intent against prior interviewer turns.

functions.name: _build_positive_boost
functions.docstring: Return a short confidence boost when the candidate gives a strong answer.

functions.name: _merge_boost_with_question
functions.docstring: Combine a short encouragement with the next question.

functions.name: _get_future_plan_items
functions.docstring: Return upcoming planned question items sorted by turn.

functions.name: _get_plan_item_for_turn
functions.docstring: Return the planned item for one specific turn.

functions.name: _infer_free_retry_category
functions.docstring: Infer the beginner question category so silence retries stay supportive.

functions.name: _build_free_retry_question
functions.docstring: Return a calmer retry question for the free plan after silence.

functions.name: _build_repeat_question
functions.docstring: Repeat the last question once in simpler wording without scoring it.

functions.name: _build_clarification_question
functions.docstring: Return a more helpful rephrase when the candidate asks for clarification.

functions.name: _build_timeout_retry_question
functions.docstring: Return the next retry wording for the same logical question after silence.

functions.name: _infer_pro_retry_category
functions.docstring: Infer the Pro question category so silence retries stay technical but fair.

functions.name: _build_free_followup_question
functions.docstring: Deterministic Free follow-up when we want one human next question instead of a static plan hop.

functions.name: _build_pro_retry_question
functions.docstring: Return a shorter or narrower Pro retry question after silence.

functions.name: _infer_career_retry_category
functions.docstring: Infer the Career question category so silence retries stay premium and relevant.

functions.name: _build_career_retry_question
functions.docstring: Return a shorter or narrower Career retry question after silence.

functions.name: _build_emergency_unique_question
functions.docstring: Guarantee a fresh question if both the model and fallback repeat themselves.

functions.name: _planned_turn_limit
functions.docstring: Use the stored plan length when available so session limits stay stable per interview.

functions.name: _build_fallback_question_plan
functions.docstring: Build a deterministic question plan when the live planner is unavailable.

functions.name: _apply_cross_session_question_cooldown
functions.docstring: Replace recently reused targets so repeated interviews feel fresher.

functions.name: _build_opening_question
functions.docstring: Pick a session opening question that avoids repeating the same opener across interviews.

functions.name: _question_template_for_category
functions.docstring: Return a deterministic next question when the model is slow or unavailable.

functions.name: _adapt_question_for_difficulty
functions.docstring: Shift fallback question wording based on the selected session difficulty.

functions.name: _build_question_preamble
functions.docstring:
Return a 1-sentence context intro for a new-topic question.

Preambles are only added to the first question on a new topic.
Follow-ups and retries skip the preamble to stay conversational.

functions.name: _render_question_template
functions.docstring: Build one fallback question with session difficulty adjustments and context preamble.

functions.name: _select_live_difficulty_signal
functions.docstring: Blend the live answer signal with the user-selected session difficulty mode.

functions.name: _infer_difficulty_signal
functions.docstring: Infer whether the next question should get easier, stay steady, or get harder.

functions.name: _build_pro_followup_hint
functions.docstring: Suggest a sharper Pro follow-up chain based on the last answer.

functions.name: _build_free_followup_hint
functions.docstring: Guide the live model toward a warmer, answer-aware Free follow-up.

functions.name: _build_pro_followup_question
functions.docstring: Deterministic Pro follow-up if the live model is unavailable.

functions.name: _is_probably_followup
functions.docstring: Estimate whether the next question should stay on the same topic.

functions.name: _should_force_topic_change
functions.docstring: Decide when to force the system away from the current topic.

functions.name: _build_fallback_ai_response
functions.docstring: Fallback interviewer response when the live model is delayed or unavailable.

functions.name: create_session
functions.docstring: Create a new interview session with pre-generated question plan.

functions.name: process_answer
functions.docstring: Process a user answer and return the next AI response or finish signal.

functions.name: _ensure_pending_evaluations
functions.docstring: Backfill any missing question evaluations before final scoring.

functions.name: finish_session
functions.docstring: Finalize the interview session and compute the final score.

services\\interview_summary.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Interview Summary Contracts
Shared turn-outcome constants and canonical summary computation used by
finish scoring, report payloads, PDF generation, and analytics-style views.

functions.name: coerce_runtime_state
functions.docstring: Safely normalize stored runtime state into a dictionary.

functions.name: coerce_question_plan_items
functions.docstring: Normalize stored question-plan payloads into a list of dict items.

functions.name: compute_interview_summary
functions.docstring: Compute one canonical summary object for reports, PDFs, analytics, and finish results.

services\\launch_offer.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Launch offer helpers
Automatically grants free Pro access for the first configured number of new users.

functions.name: queue_launch_offer_if_eligible
functions.docstring:
Auto-grant launch offer when eligible.
Returns the launch-offer row when user has or receives an offer record.

functions.name: expire_launch_offer_grant
functions.docstring: Expire an active launch-offer grant for a specific user and paid plan.

functions.name: get_launch_offer_overview
functions.docstring: Return launch-offer global counters.

functions.name: get_launch_offer_state
functions.docstring: Return launch-offer state for one user plus global remaining counters.

functions.name: reset_launch_offer_data
functions.docstring: Clear launch-offer grants and optionally reset settings to defaults.

services\\llm.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — LLM Service
Abstraction over Groq (primary) and OpenAI (fallback) with automatic failover.

functions.name: call_groq
functions.docstring: Call Groq API (primary provider).

functions.name: call_openai
functions.docstring: Call OpenAI API (fallback provider).

functions.name: call_llm
functions.docstring:
Call LLM with automatic Groq → OpenAI fallback.
Retries on transient failures before falling back.

functions.name: call_llm_json
functions.docstring: Call LLM and parse the response as JSON.

services\\manual_signup_verification.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Manual signup email verification
Sends short-lived verification codes over Gmail API and validates them before signup.

services\\plan_access.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Plan entitlement helpers
Keeps selected plan separate from purchased entitlements and enforces 30-day access windows.

functions.name: normalize_plans
functions.docstring: Return unique plans in canonical order.

functions.name: highest_plan
functions.docstring: Return the highest tier from the given plans.

functions.name: admin_override_state
functions.docstring: Return the entitlement state for admin accounts with premium override.

functions.name: _plan_status
functions.docstring: Return a human-readable plan purchase state for the stats table.

functions.name: sync_user_purchase_stats
functions.docstring: Upsert the Supabase-facing user purchase stats table.

functions.name: activate_plan_entitlement
functions.docstring: Mark a paid plan active for a fresh 30-day access window.

functions.name: ensure_plan_entitlements
functions.docstring:
Backfill entitlements from verified payments for legacy users and return active owned plans.
This keeps older purchases working with the 30-day access model.

functions.name: sync_profile_plan_state
functions.docstring:
Ensure profile.plan and subscription_status match current active entitlements.
Returns selected plan, active owned plans, highest active plan, and expired paid plans.

functions.name: set_entitlement_status
functions.docstring: Update a plan entitlement status if the plan is paid.

functions.name: get_plan_expiry_map
functions.docstring: Return the current stored expiry timestamp for each paid plan.

services\\prompts.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Prompt Templates
All system prompts for the interview engine.
Clean separation of prompting logic from application code.

functions.name: _coerce_resume_summary
functions.docstring: Normalize the stored resume summary into a dict.

functions.name: _normalize_candidate_name
functions.docstring: Clean noisy extracted names so greeting prompts stay natural.

functions.name: _build_resume_highlight_text
functions.docstring: Create a concise factual highlight string for the greeting prompt.

functions.name: _difficulty_prompt_block
functions.docstring: Return a short prompt block for the selected interview difficulty mode.

functions.name: build_master_prompt
functions.docstring: Build the adaptive master interviewer prompt.

functions.name: build_greeting_prompt
functions.docstring: Build the first-message greeting prompt.

functions.name: build_followup_prompt
functions.docstring: Build continuation prompt for the ongoing interview, including silence rules.

functions.name: build_question_plan_prompt
functions.docstring: Generate a structured question plan before the interview starts.

functions.name: build_per_question_eval_prompt
functions.docstring: Build the per-question evaluation prompt for rubric-based scoring.

functions.name: build_resume_extraction_prompt
functions.docstring: Extract structured data from resume text.

services\\public_growth.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Public growth metrics
Keeps public-facing login/dashboard counters separate from internal analytics tables.

functions.name: refresh_public_growth_metrics
functions.docstring: Recompute and persist public-facing total and active user counts.

functions.name: get_public_growth_metrics
functions.docstring: Return the latest public-facing growth metrics, refreshing them first.

services\\quota.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Quota Enforcement Service
Server-side interview quota tracking and selected-plan quota enforcement.
Admin users bypass quota limits via premium_override.

functions.name: _ensure_current_usage_period
functions.docstring: Reset the rolling quota window when the current usage period has expired.

functions.name: _resolve_selected_plan_usage
functions.docstring: Return the current rolling window start and used count for the selected plan.

functions.name: _selected_plan_limit
functions.docstring: Return the selected plan interview limit. None means unlimited.

functions.name: _effective_limit
functions.docstring: Combine plan allowance with referral bonus interviews and temporary admin bonuses.

functions.name: enforce_quota
functions.docstring: Check if the currently selected plan still has interview capacity.

functions.name: get_usage_stats
functions.docstring: Get current usage statistics for the selected plan plus highest entitlement.

functions.name: reset_period_usage
functions.docstring: Reset interview count for a new billing period.

services\\razorpay_service.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Razorpay Billing Service
Handles order creation, payment verification, webhook processing, and plan activation.
Implements a strict payment state machine: created -> pending -> verified/failed/expired.

functions.name: _get_client
functions.docstring: Lazy-init Razorpay client.

functions.name: create_order
functions.docstring:
Create a Razorpay order for a subscription plan.
Returns order details for the frontend checkout.

functions.name: verify_payment
functions.docstring:
Verify a Razorpay payment server-side.
Only VERIFIED payments unlock premium access.
Returns the updated plan info.

functions.name: handle_webhook
functions.docstring:
Handle Razorpay webhook events. Idempotent - safe to process multiple times.
Used for reconciliation, NOT as the primary payment verification path.

services\\referrals.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Referral Service
Tracks limited referral invitations and awards bonus interview credits on join.

functions.name: _is_admin_referral_email
functions.docstring: Return True when the email belongs to the configured admin override account.

functions.name: _get_referral_limit
functions.docstring: Return the referral slot limit. None means unlimited.

functions.name: normalize_email
functions.docstring: Normalize emails for collision-safe referral matching.

functions.name: ensure_referral_identity
functions.docstring: Guarantee that every user has a stable referral code.

functions.name: get_referral_summary
functions.docstring: Return referral slots, share URL, and queued/joined referral state.

functions.name: get_public_referral_context
functions.docstring: Resolve a public referral code for the invite page.

functions.name: queue_referral
functions.docstring: Queue a referral by public code without overriding existing referral ownership.

functions.name: apply_joined_referral_reward
functions.docstring:
Convert a queued referral into a rewarded referral when the invited user becomes real.
Safe to call multiple times for the same user/email.

services\\report_builder.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - PDF Report Builder
Professional interview-report PDFs with a polished fpdf2 layout and a content-rich raw fallback.

functions.name: generate_pdf_report
functions.docstring: Generate a PDF report from session data and evaluations.

services\\resume_parser.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI — Resume Parser Service
PDF extraction, sanitization, and structured parsing via LLM.

functions.name: extract_text_from_pdf
functions.docstring: Extract raw text from PDF bytes. Raises HTTPException on failure.

functions.name: sanitize_resume_text
functions.docstring: Strip potential prompt injection patterns from resume text.

functions.name: validate_pdf_upload
functions.docstring: Validate the uploaded PDF file.

functions.name: parse_resume_structured
functions.docstring: Extract structured resume data using LLM.

functions.name: _collect_resume_signal_parts
functions.docstring: Flatten structured resume sections for deterministic field inference.

functions.name: infer_resume_field_profile
functions.docstring: Infer a broad resume field and lightweight confidence using deterministic signals.

functions.name: enrich_resume_summary
functions.docstring: Preserve current structure while adding deterministic field signals.

functions.name: _default_resume_summary
functions.docstring: Fallback resume summary when LLM extraction fails.

services\\transcript.py.docstring:
PrepVista AI - Transcript Normalization Service
Corrects common speech-to-text artifacts before evaluation.

functions.name: normalize_transcript
functions.docstring:
Apply STT correction rules to raw transcript text.
Preserves original casing where possible, only corrects known artifacts.

functions.name: recover_spoken_meaning
functions.docstring:
Apply stronger transcript cleanup for beginner voice answers before free-plan scoring.
This is intentionally more forgiving than normal transcript display cleanup.

functions.name: summarize_recovered_intent
functions.docstring: Return one conservative, cleaned sentence for report corrected-intent fields.

functions.name: recover_technical_intent
functions.docstring:
Recover likely technical meaning from imperfect spoken answers for the Pro plan.
This is stricter than free-plan recovery but still tolerant of STT noise.

functions.name: recover_career_intent
functions.docstring:
Recover likely intent from longer, noisier spoken answers for the Career plan.
This is the most forgiving transcript recovery path.

functions.name: clean_for_display
functions.docstring: Clean text for display in transcript/report (remove system markers).

services\\user_activity.py.docstring:
PrepVista - Live user activity tracking
Keeps a small database snapshot of total, active, and inactive users.

functions.name: refresh_user_activity_stats
functions.docstring: Recompute and persist live user counts.

functions.name: record_user_presence
functions.docstring: Touch the user's last_seen timestamp with throttling to avoid noisy writes.
